title: RedwoodSDK
excerpt: description: Create a RedwoodSDK application and deploy it to Cloudflare Workers. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this guide, you will create a new [RedwoodSDK ↗](https://rwsdk.com/) application and deploy it to Cloudflare Workers. RedwoodSDK is a framework for building server-side web applications on Cloudflare. It is a Vite plugin that provides SSR, React Server Components, Server Functions, and realtime capabilities.
